content:
**Zelenskyy Appears in Suit at EU Summit, Market Resolves 'Yes'**

*Kyiv, July 1, 2025* — Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has been photographed wearing a suit at the European Union Leaders’ Summit in Brussels on June 28, 2025, satisfying the conditions of the closely-watched prediction market regarding his attire. The market, which hinged on whether Zelenskyy would don a suit between May 22 and June 30, 2025, will resolve to "Yes" following the release of official summit photographs.

The images, distributed by the Ukrainian presidential press service and major international news agencies, show Zelenskyy in a dark navy suit and light blue tie, standing alongside EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen and French President Emmanuel Macron. The photographs were taken and published on June 28, well within the market’s deadline.

Political analysts note that Zelenskyy’s return to formal attire for this high-profile diplomatic occasion marks a symbolic shift. Since the Russian invasion began in 2022, Zelenskyy has been known for his signature olive-green military-style shirts and casual wear, a sartorial statement of solidarity with Ukraine’s armed forces. “Donning a suit for the Brussels summit sends a message of Ukraine’s readiness for serious EU accession talks,” said Kyiv-based analyst Olena Shevchuk.

Prediction market participants and observers can expect official resolution to "Yes" in the coming days, as the photographic evidence meets all stipulated criteria.
